features.name: Draconic Resilience
features.description: While you are not wearing armor, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier. You can use a shield and still gain this benefit.

features.name: Time Dragon Breath Weapon
features.description: As an action, you exhale a 15-foot cone of shifting temporal energy. Creatures must make a Constitution saving throw against your Spell DC (8 + Prof + CON). On a failure, they take 2d6 temporal force damage and their movement speed is halved for 1 turn. On a success, they take half damage and their speed is normal.

features.name: Breath Weapon Upgrade
features.description: Your Breath Weapon damage increases by 2d6 at levels 5 (4d6), 11 (6d6), and 17 (8d6).

features.name: Draconic Flight (Wings)
features.description: Your draconic wings fully mature. You gain a permanent flying speed equal to your current walking speed.

features.name: Draconic Ascension (True Dragon Size)
features.description: You break the limits of your mortal shell. Your permanently become a Large creature, your reach increases by 5 feet, and you gain immunity to your choice of temporal or force damage.

features.name: Draconic Spellcasting
features.description: You learn to channel spells directly from your draconic bloodline. You use Charisma as your spellcasting ability modifier for these spells.
